title: Slack as Widget
excerpt: It would be really helpful to have a slack widget in the item overview where we view a channel the same way we do emails from the email widget. Ideally able to add multiple Slack widgets to the view with one channel per …

posts.author: MRoush (Morgan Roush)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really helpful to have a slack widget in the item overview where we view a channel the same way we do emails from the email widget. Ideally able to add multiple Slack widgets to the view with one channel per view. We manage both client and production conversations for our projects in Slack. A view for each channel on the item overview with the ability to send and receive messages would be amazing.
